question: To fly an UA outdoors for recreation purpose, with a total weight of 1.1 kg, you should:

options.text: apply class 2 activity permit regardless within 5 km of an airport.
not apply class 1 activity permit when flying above 200 feet.
apply class 1 activity permit when beyond line of sight.
not apply class 2 activity permit when flying outside the 'no-fly' zone and below 200 feet.
